creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes, I think you are right.

Most hardware vendors start numbering at 1, but I'm a C-programmer, and I'm used to start number at 0. Yeah.

I'm open to suggestion how to improve virtual OSS, also like configuration. Blind users find the command line and text based way of using it useful.

Also there is the GUI tool for virtual_oss. It can show the configuration somewhat visually and then you'll see what you have configured.

--HPS
